description: Run a clean mainline topk baseline at K=128 / EF=12 with signum and LR=8e-4 to establish the first curve-shape and runtime anchor for this session.
self_review: This round is calibration-first rather than improvement-first. It intentionally avoids introducing a confounded recipe change so the next LR move can be chosen from actual curve shape instead of guesswork.

description: Keep the topk mainline recipe fixed and run a single-variable learning-rate probe at LR=6e-4 against the K=128 EF=12 signum baseline.
self_review: This follows the prescribed mainline order after the clean baseline and changes only LR. The prompt does not expose detailed curve-shape metrics, so this is the more conservative LR probe before considering optimizer changes.

description: Keep the topk mainline recipe fixed and run the opposite single-variable learning-rate probe at LR=1e-3 for K=128 EF=12 with signum.
self_review: This stays on the prescribed mainline path: same family, same K, same optimizer, one LR-only question. Since 6e-4 regressed, the most informative next move is to bracket the baseline from the other side before switching optimizers.

description: Keep the topk mainline recipe fixed at K=128 EF=12 LR=1e-3 and run a single-variable optimizer swap from signum to adam.
self_review: This follows the prescribed mainline order: after establishing the better LR anchor, the next clean question is optimizer choice. LR, K, and family stay fixed so any curve or FVU change can be attributed to the optimizer.
